prompt_text:
### Demographics: 51-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Worsening edema and dyspnea over the last 3 months.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (maternal grandmother)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~3.8 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Lobeglitazone 0.5mg once daily; Insulin Detemir 20units once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 81.1 kg; Height 181.1 cm; BMI 24.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 111/71 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.0%; 9 months ago 9.4%; 6 months ago 9.9%; 3 months ago 10.4%; current 10.4%), FPG (12 months ago 204mg/dL; 9 months ago 208mg/dL; 6 months ago 283mg/dL; 3 months ago 300mg/dL; current 284mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 81.3kg; 9 months ago 83.3kg; 6 months ago 83.2kg; 3 months ago 83.1kg; current 81.1kg), Height (12 months ago 181.1cm; 9 months ago 181.1cm; 6 months ago 181.1cm; 3 months ago 181.1cm; current 181.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 24.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 111mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 71mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 87U/L; 9 months ago 86U/L; 6 months ago 78U/L; 3 months ago 87U/L; current 82U/L), AST (12 months ago 80U/L; 9 months ago 86U/L; 6 months ago 78U/L; 3 months ago 77U/L; current 81U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; current 36mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 179mg/g; 9 months ago 266mg/g; 6 months ago 217mg/g; 3 months ago 228mg/g; current 281mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 88mg/dL; 6 months ago 85mg/dL; 3 months ago 89mg/dL; current 87mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 43mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 149mg/dL; 9 months ago 148mg/dL; 6 months ago 130mg/dL; 3 months ago 126mg/dL; current 138mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.8g/dL; 6 months ago 10.1g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 10.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
